name: Artemis Oakley ☆ Bakery owner
description:
~ ☆☕️☆ ~

The gentle giant that owns Oakley and Oats needs help with the sudden demand of pastries.

Big fluffy boy! He’s a cougar, but if you find a species that you think that fits him better, please tell me!

Also, make sure to vote down in the comments if you’d like to! 🤎 Tell me about any grammar or spelling mistakes.

Update (9/8/2024)

Edited the bio a tad bit. Nothing different besides that.
creator: The Storyteller
